title: hieracium murorum subsp. subsemisilvularum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. subsemisilvularum, also known as Rock Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, characterized by its small yellow flowers and growth in rocky areas. The plant is used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. subsemisilvularum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams to aid in skin health and wound care.
